articles.title_en: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.title_ru: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.preview_en: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

articles.title_en: Govee’s smart nugget ice maker makes every iced drink feel like a luxury
articles.title_ru: Govee’s smart nugget ice maker makes every iced drink feel like a luxury
articles.preview_en: For some people, the ice in a beverage is almost as important as the drink itself. That’s the audience Govee had in mind when designing its latest ice maker, the GoveeLife Smart Nugget Ice Maker Pro.

articles.title_en: Pakistan Wants the World to See It as a Peacemaker. I Want It to Find My Father.
